title: Not Enough Tooltips (NET)
description: Have you ever wondered what's your pickaxe's durability but needed to go to your inventory? Well, now, with this mod, you can see enchants, durability and more just by selecting it in your hotbar outside inventory!
body:
A lightweight **Fabric** mod for Minecraft 1.21.10+ that displays a sleek, animated popup showing item statistics whenever you switch items in your main hand.

## ✨ Features
- **Dynamic Stats**: Displays Attack Damage and Durability.
- **Enchantment List**: Shows all current enchantments on the item.
- **Fade Animation**: Smooth fade-out effect so the UI doesn't clutter your screen.
- **Lightweight**: Built with performance in mind using native Minecraft rendering.

## 🛠️ Installation
1. Make sure you have **Fabric Loader** AND **Fabric API** installed for 1.21.10+.
2. Download the .jar of the mod from **THE OFFICIAL MODRINTH, CURSEFORGE (later) OR GITHUB PAGE** and place it in .minecraft/mods
